posts.author: chashowiii (Chas Howard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Has anyone else wanted to see the value of a mirrored formula column but you just can’t? This feature would solve a lot of my problems

What are you trying to achieve

I would love to be able to read the value of a mirrored formula column so that I could use that value in my API requests. I think this would really open up the capabilities of developers in the monday space.
